name: Guest 7331
description:
... Dont you think its rude to stare?

Like, really.

You've been staring at my ass for 10 solid minutes.

can you finally snap back to fucking reality??

You dont need to be a perv for this. Just Ask for it, god fucking damn it!

Okay fine. You WILL have the MEN that you've yearned for.

For so long, i've been trying to make a good concept, to no avail...

And for now, to satisfy the masses... You're getting this.

I mean, its not like its really bad, its just average, i guess. Hence the room for more improvement.

Also 2 characters in 1 day enjoy
